case_title: GOLDEN GATE REPORTERS VS SILBERMAN HOWARD LAW OFFICES OF HOWARD SILBERMAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $176.40 FILED BY GOLDEN GATE REPORTERS AS TO DEFENDANT SILBERMAN HOWARD LAW OFFICES OF HOWARD SILBERMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SILBERMAN HOWARD LAW OFFICES OF HOWARD SILBERMAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE REPORTERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILBERMAN HOWARD LAW OFFICES OF HOWARD SILBERMAN $176.40 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $176.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE REPORTERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILBERMAN HOWARD LAW OFFICES OF HOWARD SILBERMAN $176.40 PRINCIPAL, $53.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $229.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SILBERMAN HOWARD LAW OFFICES OF HOWARD SILBERMAN
